meta.title: Become AI-Native in 3 steps · Fibe
meta.description: Become AI-native in 3 steps: dockerize your app, deploy to Fibe in one command, then chat with your LLM to ship changes. From a docker-compose to a live, AI-native workflow — in minutes, not months.
meta.keywords: Fibe, AI-native development, SDLC, docker compose, deploy, playgrounds, AI agents, chat, LLM, CI/CD, live preview, developer platform
meta.og_description: Dockerize your app, deploy to Fibe in one command, then chat with your LLM to ship changes — from a docker-compose to a live, AI-native workflow.
meta.twitter_description: Dockerize, deploy to Fibe, and chat with your LLM — from a local docker-compose to a live, AI-native workflow.

video.label: Watch the full demo
video.aria: Product demo: transforming an SDLC into AI-native workflows with Fibe

dockerize.title: Dockerize your app
dockerize.lede: Ensure developers can run it locally. Most likely you already have it ready.

deploy.title: Deploy to Fibe
deploy.lede: Runs in Docker — runs on Fibe.
deploy.how: Add a few labels to your docker-compose.yml
deploy.get: Isolated environment with a URL, connected to git

chat.title: Chat with your LLM
chat.lede: Start an agent of your choice. Describe changes naturally.
chat.how: Chat from a mobile or a laptop
chat.get: Changes available immediately on the URL
chat.progress: Stored on a personal/feature branch in git
